description: Features: - Overall: The solid color girls backpack for school has simple outwards and practical inwards. - Material: The solid color girls school bag bookbag is made of high density nylon fabric, waterproof, anti-wear and easy-to-clean. - Comfortable and lightweight: The girls school bag backpack has s-shaped adjustable shoulder straps, padded back panel, sponge decompression handle; Designed for alleviating weight on your back, much closer to your body. - Large capacity backpack for girls school elementary: Scientific and reasonable pockets and compartments design will make your daily supplies lay in the bag systematically. < - Occasions: Daily use / school / weekend travel / outdoor sports / shopping etc... - Specifically designed for primary and middle school girls; Great gift item for your kids Package includes: 1 * Backpack only
